title: The Alliance Collides with Kaido’s Forces
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Kid, Unknown person #6, Luffy, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Within the keep, at zero's location...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Huff... huff...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: KWA KWA KWA! Call us gifters!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: There are almost 500 of us! Kakaka!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's just one devil fruit user after another....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why did you even come here? Why not follow kaido-san? It'd be easier that way! ♥

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once upon a time, we all tried to become pirate King, too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: JUST GIVE IN!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You still have a chance to throw in the towel!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All you need to do is KNEEL BEFORE Kaido-SAMA!

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: within the keep, at kid's location

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I told you before, kid! Breaking in through the front lines is insane!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We lost sight of heat's group, but as long as they don't get found out, we'll manage!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Bring it on! Killing you is our shot at a promotion!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please wait a moment! Kaido-sama is searching for someone!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Pay me no mind! Just carry on!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dropping your guard means you get to drop dead!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: AYAAH!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: within the keep, at Luffy's location

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Aaah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Pay- pay! Are you all right!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Stay with me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'll take care of this!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You bastard, you've got some balls doing that to pay-pay!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Um? You're the one who rode him down the stairs like a sled.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who the hell are you!? Who do you work for!? What group are you with!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're mistaken, ultra-sama! He's one of the intruders!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The man who will become King of the Pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Come again?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: gyahaha! whose castle does this guy think he's in?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's only one man who's gonna be pirate King...

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: And it's Kaido- Sama! You ultra-idiot- bastard!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: A Headbutt?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'm gonna bash your skull to pieces!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Ulli skull cannon!!!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 36 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
